en.about.title: Eric Wang
en.about.desc: CS + Statistics student at the University of Toronto. Building ML systems and backend infrastructure — interested in the gap between research and production.
en.about.story.p1: I'm a Computer Science student at the University of Toronto, focused on machine learning engineering and backend systems. Most of what I build sits at the boundary between a research idea and something that actually runs reliably — whether that's a RAG pipeline with explicit context management, a multi-tier caching strategy, or an LLM inference loop that needs to be fast enough to be useful.
en.about.story.p2: I spend a lot of time reading papers and then asking what it would actually take to implement the idea properly. That's led me to build end-to-end: from schema design and API layering through to the frontend that makes the system usable. My long-term direction is ML Engineering or Applied AI — building systems where the model is one component of something larger, not the entire product.
en.about.available: Open to internship and new grad ML/backend roles.
en.home.hero.desc: ML systems, backend infrastructure, and interactive tooling. Interested in the gap between a research idea and something that actually ships.

zh.about.title: Eric Wang
zh.about.desc: 多伦多大学计算机科学 + 统计学在读学生。构建机器学习系统与后端基础设施，专注于研究与生产之间的鸿沟。
zh.about.story.p1: 我是多伦多大学计算机科学专业的学生，专注于机器学习工程与后端系统。我构建的大部分项目都处于研究想法与可靠运行系统之间的边界——无论是具有显式上下文管理的 RAG 流水线、多层缓存策略，还是需要足够快才实用的 LLM 推理循环。
zh.about.story.p2: 我花了大量时间阅读论文，然后思考真正实现这个想法需要什么。这促使我端到端地构建：从数据库 Schema 设计和 API 分层，到让系统易于使用的前端界面。我的长期方向是机器学习工程或应用 AI——构建模型只是更大系统中一个组件的系统，而不是整个产品。
zh.about.available: 正在寻找 ML / 后端方向的实习与应届生岗位。
zh.home.hero.desc: ML 系统、后端基础设施与交互工具。关注研究想法与实际落地之间的距离。
